data.acceptance:
1. Knots supports a native execution_plan knot type with the execution_plan_sdlc builtin workflow and both autopilot and semiauto profiles.
2. Knots persists typed execution-plan payload data and exposes supported CLI read/write surfaces for it.
3. Foolery persists and drives execution plans through execution_plan knots instead of sidecar or in-memory plan storage.
4. Foolery creates or reconciles planned_by provenance edges between generated work knots and their execution_plan knot.
5. A real Foolery execution_plan knot exists for the grooming-to-execution spec and its generated work tree is linked and tagged according to the reviewed design.
